= Web4 Documentation Portal =

Welcome to the official documentation for the Web4 Ecosystem.

The Web4 platform provides infrastructure, AI services, blockchain technology, cloud systems, APIs, SDKs, developer tools, and documentation for building intelligent applications.

----

== Projects ==

* [[Web4]]
* [[QubuHub]]
* [[Aura Ecosystem]]
* [[Fadaka Blockchain]]
* [[GPT-5 Mini]]
* [[RODAAI]]
* [[NeuroMindAI]]
* [[LAMIS]]

----

== Where to Begin ==

'''New Users'''
* Read [[Start]]
* Follow [[Quick Start]]
* Install Web4

'''Developers'''
* Read [[Architecture]]
* Explore the [[API Reference]]
* Install the [[SDK Documentation]]

'''Operators'''
* Configure [[Deployment]]
* Review [[Security]]
* Set up [[CI/CD]]

----

Excellent. At this point, IвЂ™d treat Wikixedia as a complete documentation platform rather than just a wiki.

A long-term architecture could look like this:

Wikixedia
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Core Engine
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Parser
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Renderer
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Search Engine
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Storage Engine
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Plugin Manager
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Documentation
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Markdown
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ NF
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MediaWiki
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ RDoc
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AsciiDoc
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ reStructuredText
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AI
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AI Search
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AI Chat
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AI Translation
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AI Summarization
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AI Documentation Generator
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ AI Code Explanation
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Collaboration
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Discussions
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Comments
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Reviews
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Revisions
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Notifications
в”‚

в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ GitHub
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ GitLab
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Bitbucket
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ OpenAPI

в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ API

в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ GraphQL
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ WebSocket
в”‚
в””в”Ђв”Ђ Administration
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Users
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Roles
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Analytics
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Themes
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ Plugins

A corresponding monorepo could be:

wikixedia/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ apps/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ web/              # Next.js frontend
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ api/              # FastAPI backend
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ editor/           # Rich document editor
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ desktop/          # Optional desktop app
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ packages/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ parser/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ nf/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ markdown/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mediawiki/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ rdoc/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ asciidoc/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ search/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ai/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ui/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ sdk/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ services/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ indexing/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ notifications/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ analytics/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ rendering/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ docs/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ examples/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tests/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ docker/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ kubernetes/
в””в”Ђв”Ђ .github/


*platform that powers documentation across every projects
Web4, QubuHub, Aura Ecosystem, Fadaka Blockchain, GPT-5 Mini, RODAAI, NeuroMindAI, LAMIS, and future additionsвЂ”while supporting multiple documentation formats, versioning, AI-assisted authoring, and extensibility through plugins.
